race.comment: Keen to stick with talented filly ALPHA SOFIE (3) who was far too good first up in G3 company at Caulfield, given a good ride but pouncing on them once clear and racing away to win easily. First look at the straight but she seems professional and they'll do well to match what she's been putting up of late. TORONADO QUEEN (12) resumed with a dominant win over the handy Exit at Cranbourne, scoring by nearly 4 lengths. She's clearly come back very well and can go on with it. NASHVILLE JACK (1) was last seen running second to Grafterburners in the Sunlight at Gold Coast. He's off a let up here but anything like that will see him hard to beat. SIGNATURE SCENT (8) was okay behind Alpha Sophie fresh, fancy she'll be better if ridden up on speed here. FUNDAMENTAL NATURE (13) is unbeaten in two starts and can run another good race up in class.
